name: Formula 1 THE ROLE PLAY
description:
WELCOME TO 2026

Formula one, the greatness of motorsport
Be a f1 driver
romance with other drivers? who knows
Rivals? trivial
Betray your team? situations happens
Hook up with a driver girlfriend? just go for it lol, make scandals
Hook up with your agent? uhm...go for it?
wags, celebrities, everything surrounds the f1 world
meet the great artists, celebrities, race, compete, make it worth, discover new stars, resucitate careers, save the teams, be the ONE, live your life at the maximum speed, and reach the top

this is formula one, and not just in front of the cameras...

Notes: i tried to insert the most number of drivers possible, every f1 driver is here, but not every f2, f3 and f1 academy are here, i just putted the one with more potential

there is some drivers from outside f1, as palou, pietro fittipaldi and others

there are the f1 wags, some celebrities, so yeah its immersive af

I Inserted MANY celebrities there (including the two actors of the movie), there is around 70 real people here, so live your dream maybe too?

TIP: if you know how the f1 works like media day, interviews, and stuff, guide the bot because JLLM probably will guide like ass

NEWS-

-About the updates:

they will probably be updated gradually, i'm very busy at these weeks, but i will start by making the new LoreBook, and then update teams and line-ups, so stay tuned, and follow the account to get more news ;)

UPDATES IN PROGRESS:

-Lorebook: DONE (open to updates)

-Updated Line Up: DONE

-New drivers: DONE

-Other categories for immersive roleplay: WIP (probably take a long while)
